title: Healthecareers Jobs Scraper
description: Scrape healthcare jobs from Healthecareers.com. Provide either keyword/location/category OR a Healthecareers search URL (startUrl, url, or startUrls). Actor paginates and returns a clean, deduplicated dataset.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: Start scraping from a specific Healthecareers search URL. If provided, this will be used instead of Keyword/Location.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of jobs
results_wanted.description: The maximum number of jobs to collect. Leave empty to collect all available jobs.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: A safety cap on the number of search result pages to visit.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy (datacenter recommended for Healthecareers).
